filters.title: Filters
filters.sourceFileHint: Exact filename, for example example.ks. Use Search above for partial matching.

entryTable.title: Entries
entryTable.autoSaveHelp: Entry edits are saved automatically after a short pause.
entryTable.batchHelp: Batch actions apply to all rows matching the current filters, not just this page.
entryTable.clearTranslationsConfirm: Clear translated and polished text for {{total}} filtered entries?

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoSaveHelp: Changes are saved automatically after a short pause.

exportSection.title: Export
exportSection.help: Exports UTF-8 text in the format original<TAB>final-text.

maintenanceSection.title: Maintenance
maintenanceSection.help: Runs database cleanup for rows whose original text becomes empty after invisible-whitespace normalization. This is manual only and no longer runs at startup.
maintenanceSection.fillTranslatedHelp: Manually fills empty translated_text fields by reusing the best existing translated_text for the same original text anywhere in the database. The fill job first scans only source texts that are still missing translated_text, then looks up the best existing candidate for those texts in batches. When multiple candidates exist, higher status wins first, then newer rows.

translationSection.title: Batch Translation
translationSection.allowOverwrite: Allow overwrite existing target field content
translationSection.help: Runs {{provider}} against the current filters. LLM providers keep KS lines from the same file together when possible and include speaker, voice_id, type, and nearby-line context.
translationSection.manualHelp: Manual translation has no automatic API. Switch to Google, Baidu, OpenAI Chat, or OpenAI Responses.

sourceRecognitionSection.title: Source Recognition
sourceRecognitionSection.help: Finds playvoice_notext rows under the current filters, matches voice_id to an audio filename inside the source arc, sends the extracted file to the ASR endpoint, and writes the recognized text back into source_text.

arc-ks-folder-text.label: Arc Folder / KS Text
arc-ks-folder-text.help: Imports a folder shaped like arc-folder-name\ks-file-name.txt, where each line is original<TAB>translation.

arc-source-text-file.label: Arc Source Text
arc-source-text-file.help: Imports a folder containing .txt files named after arcs, such as script.txt or script.arc.txt. Each line can be original or original<TAB>translation.

entry-jsonl.label: Entry Snapshot JSONL
entry-jsonl.help: Imports a JSONL snapshot previously exported by this tool. It preserves source identity fields, translated text, polished text, status, and timestamps.

ks-extract-csv.label: ks_extract CSV
ks-extract-csv.help: Imports a ks_extract CSV using source arc, source file, and source text. Type, voice_id, and role are used only when those cells are present.

translated-csv.label: Translated CSV
translated-csv.help: Imports a folder containing *_translated.csv files. Each file is mapped back to its .ks name, then existing arcs are inferred from the database.

tab-text.label: JAT General Text Translation Module Format
tab-text.help: Exports UTF-8 text in a format that JAT can load directly. The exporter escapes newlines, tabs, backslashes, and similar special characters using JAT-compatible rules; if a source line starts with ; or $, that row is skipped instead of being exported. Only one row is kept for each original text because the format cannot preserve source identity. When duplicates conflict, the exporter prefers polished/reviewed rows and then newer rows.

voice-subtitle-text.label: JAT Voice Subtitle Format
voice-subtitle-text.help: Exports UTF-8 text in the same tab-text format, but uses voice_id as the source key and final text as the target text. Final text prefers polished_text over translated_text. Any row with a non-empty voice_id and final text can participate. If multiple rows share the same voice_id, the exporter prefers polished rows first, then status and recency.

entry-jsonl.label: Entry Snapshot JSONL
entry-jsonl.help: Exports a line-delimited JSON snapshot of full entry records so the data can be imported back later without losing fields such as type, voiceId, role, source arc/file, translated text, polished text, status, and timestamps.

manual.label: Manual
manual.help: Manual mode is for direct editing only and does not send automatic translation requests.

google-translate.label: Google Translate
google-translate.help: Uses the Google Cloud Translation API. Requires an API key.

baidu-translate.label: Baidu Translate
baidu-translate.help: Uses the Baidu general text translation API. Requires an AppID and secret.

openai-chat.label: OpenAI Chat
openai-chat.help: Uses the OpenAI Chat Completions API. Supports custom base URL, model, prompt, and extra JSON parameters.

openai-responses.label: OpenAI Responses
openai-responses.help: Uses the OpenAI Responses API. Supports custom base URL, model, prompt, and extra JSON parameters.

qwen3-asr.label: Qwen3-ASR
qwen3-asr.help: Uses a Qwen3-ASR compatible OpenAI-style audio transcription endpoint to backfill original text for playvoice_notext rows.

translationSettings.title: Translation Settings
translationSettings.retryHelp: Extra retry attempts after the first failed batch. Failed entries stay in the retry queue until this limit is exhausted.

proxy.help: Applies to LLM, machine translation, and ASR requests. Default is system proxy. On Windows, the app first checks system Internet Settings and falls back to environment proxy variables.

translationSettings.glossaryHelp: Shared across LLM translators. Enter source text, preferred translation, and an optional note. Preferred may be empty. The frontend stores JSON, and the backend only sends entries matching the current source text, nearby lines, speaker, type, voice_id, arc, or file.
translationSettings.manualHelp: No extra configuration is required for manual mode.

asr.title: Source Recognition (ASR)
asr.help: Used by Source Recognition. The app extracts the matched voice file from the source arc and sends it to this OpenAI-style audio transcription endpoint. When Batch Size is greater than 1, the app will send batch requests to the /batch endpoint and fall back to single-file requests if that batch call fails.

openai.promptHelp: Leave blank to use the built-in prompt. Custom prompts support placeholders: {{source_language}}, {{target_language}}, {{target_field}}, {{mode_instruction}}, {{context_instruction}}, {{glossary}}, and {{response_format}}.
openai.placeholders: Placeholder reference: {{source_language}}=source language, {{target_language}}=target language, {{target_field}}=write target, {{mode_instruction}}=task-specific instruction for translate or polish, {{context_instruction}}=context constraints, {{glossary}}=formatted glossary instructions, {{response_format}}=required JSON output contract.
openai.extraJsonHelp: Provide a valid JSON object to append additional official API parameters.

maintenanceProgress.waitingSourceText: Waiting for the next source text

messages.proxyTestSuccess: Proxy test succeeded. Target: {{targetUrl}}, Final: {{finalUrl}}, Status: {{status}}, Mode: {{proxyMode}}, Proxy: {{proxy}}
messages.translatorTestManual: Manual mode does not support translator testing.
messages.translatorTestSuccess: Translator test succeeded. Translator: {{translator}}, Target: {{targetField}}, Source: {{sourceText}}, Output: {{outputText}}, Time: {{responseTime}} ms
messages.asrTestSilentSample: (empty text is normal for the built-in silent test audio)
messages.maintenanceStarted: Started maintenance cleanup for invisible-blank source rows.
messages.maintenanceCleanedInvisibleBlankEntries: Maintenance complete. Removed {{count}} source rows that were blank after invisible-whitespace cleanup.
messages.maintenanceNoChanges: Maintenance complete. No invisible-blank source rows were found.
messages.maintenanceFillStarted: Started maintenance fill for empty translated_text rows using existing matches from the database.
messages.maintenanceFilledTranslatedEntries: Maintenance complete. Filled translated_text for {{count}} rows using the best existing match for the same original text.
messages.maintenanceFillNoChanges: Maintenance complete. No empty translated_text rows could be filled from existing matches.
messages.scanComplete: Scanned {{scanned}} arc files. New: {{newArcCount}}, Parsed: {{parsedCount}}, Failed: {{failedCount}}
messages.reparseAllComplete: Retried all {{totalArcs}} arc files. Parsed: {{reparsedCount}}, Failed: {{failedCount}}, Skipped: {{skippedCount}}
messages.reparseFailedComplete: Retried {{totalFailed}} failed arc files. Parsed: {{reparsedCount}}, Failed: {{failedCount}}
messages.loadedEntries: Loaded up to {{limit}} records for this page, total {{total}}.
messages.translateStarted: Started batch translation with {{translator}}. LLM request and response logs will stream below.
messages.sourceRecognitionStarted: Started source recognition with {{provider}}. Request and response logs will stream below.
messages.stopRequested: Stop requested for the current task.
messages.clearTranslationsComplete: Cleared translated and polished text for {{updated}} filtered entries.
messages.importComplete: Import complete. Files: {{filesProcessed}}, Lines: {{totalLines}}, Inserted: {{inserted}}, Updated: {{updated}}, Skipped: {{skipped}}, Unmatched: {{unmatched}}, Errors: {{errorLines}}
messages.translateComplete: Translation complete. Total: {{total}}, Processed: {{processed}}, Updated: {{updated}}, Skipped: {{skipped}}, Failed: {{failed}}
messages.sourceRecognitionComplete: Source recognition complete with {{provider}}. Total: {{total}}, Processed: {{processed}}, Updated: {{updated}}, Skipped: {{skipped}}, Failed: {{failed}}
